title: gentiana polymorpha subsp. norica
intro: Gentiana polymorpha subsp. norica is a subspecies of the Gentiana polymorpha plant, commonly known as the closed gentian or small gentian, a type of flowering plant in the gentian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gentiana polymorpha subsp. norica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
